content: [P1-1] Initialize Next.js app with TypeScript, Tailwind, and install dependencies (Turso, Drizzle, Netlify Functions)
[P1-2] Setup Turso local dev database and configure Drizzle schema with rooms, groups, roomBookings, guests tables
[P1-3] Create seed script to pre-populate 6 rooms with rates and push schema to database
[P2-1] Build Netlify Functions for Groups, Room Bookings, Guests, and Rooms APIs with pricing/availability logic
[P3-1] Create frontend views: Dashboard, Groups Master, Group Creation Flow, Master Calendar, Kitchen Report, Housekeeping
[P4-6] Add PWA configuration (manifest, service worker, install prompt) and authentication, test locally, deploy to production
